use_cases: Display customer testimonials on a landing page to build social proof and trust
Showcase customer reviews with quotes and ratings in a visually appealing grid layout
Build credibility for a product or service through authentic customer feedback
Feature testimonials as part of a homepage hero section or dedicated testimonials page
Highlight user endorsements and success stories in an organized card-based format
ai_summary: A testimonials section component that displays customer quotes and reviews in a card-based layout with a subtle grid pattern background. Designed to build social proof and trust for products or services, commonly used on landing pages and product showcases. Features a clean, minimalist aesthetic with a decorative SVG grid pattern overlay.
